name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the eggs to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the carrots, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract, stirring until just mixed.
4. Stir in the crushed pineapple, coconut, and 1/2 cup of nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 50 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
8. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
9. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar, butter, and vanilla extract, mixing until well blended.
10. Frost the cooled cake with the cream cheese frosting.
11. Sprinkle the remaining nuts on top.
12. Store in the refrigerator.
